DP.262.0000:
It’s a bed...
Want to take a rest?
DP.262.0001:
[0103,0000] quickly fell asleep
in the bed...\f
DP.262.0002:
[0103,0000] and the Pokémon
became fully healed from the rest!
DP.262.0003:
Team Galactic Nap Room\f
Ensure the bed is unoccupied
before getting into it!
DP.262.0004:
Team Galactic TV Room\f
State-of-the-art audio & video
system for member use only!\f
Onward to a new universe!
Team Galactic!
DP.262.0005:
The Team Galactic credo!
Everything belongs to Team Galactic!\f
Look beyond the world--space will
become Team Galactic’s!
DP.262.0006:
There is a notice tacked on to
the kitchen sink.\f
“Health and prosperity through
the partaking of favorite foods!”\f
Foul, unidentifiable substances are
caked around the sink...
DP.262.0007:
There is a notice taped on to
the refrigerator.\f
“Drink all you wish and gain the
energy to move us forward!”\f
The refrigerator is filled with murky,
sinister drinks and nothing else...
